titleStmt.title: SII 28.259: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 259. (A.R. No. 413 of 1913.)

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, central shrine, north base.

Records an order from Tirumalli-nāyakkar addressed to the tāṉattār of Āṟagaḷūr conveying his decision regarding the right of worship all round the thirty days of the month (muppadu-vaṭṭam) of the God Tirukkāmīśvaramuḍaiyanāyiṉār of Āṟagaḷūr. There was a dispute in this connection. One Nambiyār-Tiruñānasambanda-paṇḍitar was originally having the right for all the thirty days but Nambiyār Aḻagiyār claimed the right for 15 days. This claim was not probably sustained. One Paśupati-paṇḍitar was also sold the right for 7(1/2) days by the temple. In this state of the dispute the worship seems to have suffered and the chief had originally ordered the worship of the 15 days in a month to be got done by engaging person/persons on wages. Now when the chief had come to Āṟagaḷur he summoned the nāṭṭāvar and the mahājanas of the four agarams, of Kuḷattūr, Alamapaḷam, Śaḍaiyaṉpaṭṭu and Maṭṭiyakkuṟichchi to hear both sides. Tirumānasambanda-paṇḍitar and Paśupati-paṇḍitar stated their case. Finally he decided that the kāṇi (right along with the prequisites pertaining) of worship for all the thrity days will belong to Tiruñānasambanda-paṇḍitar and the conveyance-deed given to Paśupati-paṇḍitar will become null and void.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
raktākṣi varuṣam kāttikai mātam 2 10 7 tiyati śrīmatu tirumalli nāyakkar Āṟakaḻur tāṉattārkku varakkāṭṭiṉa kāriyam Āvatu Āṟakaḻur Uṭaiyār tirukkāmīśvaramuṭaiya nāyiṉār pūcai nāḷ
muppatu vaṭṭamum nampiyār tiruñānacampanta paṇṭitar pūcittup ponta Itile muṉpe nampiyār Aḻakiyārkku patiṉ Añcu nāḷ kāṇi Uṇṭu Eṉṟum kālaṟṟa kāṇi Āṭci Aṉupavittu ponta Itu tiṟappu Āka veṇum Eṉṟum Inta Aḻakiyār kāṇi patiṉ Añca nāḷum Iṟaṅkal Iṭṭa mariātikku
koyilile paṭṭolai Uṇṭu Eṉṟum pacupati paṇṭitarait tāṅkaḷ Aḻaippittu Itile Eḻarai nāḷ Avarkku caṇṭecurap peruvilai Ākat tāṅkaḷ cātaṉam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi Āle pattu Eṭṭut talaimuṟai Āka naṭantu ponta kāṇiyai tāṅkaḷ vaṉmaiyile Eḻarai nā
ḷ cātaṉam paṇṇuvittuk kuṭuttārkaḷ Eṉṟum pūṟuvi Āṉa tiruñāṉacampanta paṇṭitar puṟap paṟṟe poy Iruntapaṭi Āle niyāyam Āṉa mariyātikku niṉṟayam paṇṇuvittu kuṭukkiṟom Eṉṟum nāṭṭavar Olai varakkāṭṭi Aḻaippittapaṭiāle vanteṉ Eṉṟum Inta tiruñā
ṉacampanta paṇṭitar muṉpe coṉṉapaṭiāle taṅkaḷaiyum Aḻaippittu nāṭṭavar muṉpāka tiruñāṉacampanta paṇṭitaṟkum pacupati paṇṭitaṟkum Uṇṭu Āṉa vaḻakku keṭṭu Avarkaḷ niṉṟayam paṇṇiṉa mariāti keṭka Eṉṟum Aḷavum tāṅkaḷ tiṟappu Eṉṟu coṉṉa
patiṉ Añcu nāḷum kūli Āḷ Iṭṭu pūcippikka Eṉṟu muṉpe taṅkaḷukku nām Olai kuṭuttapaṭiāle nāmum Āṟakaḻūṟku vanta poḻutu Inta tiruñāṉacampanta paṇṭitar vaḻakkukeṭṭu niyāyam Āṉa mariātikku niṉṟayam paṇṇaveṇum Eṉṟum co
llukaiāle nāmum nāṭṭavarum Āka mahājanaṅkaḷ muṉpuāka Iraṇṭu tiṟattāraiyum vaḻakku keṭṭukkoḷḷac colli maṉittaraiyum kūṭṭi poka viṭṭa Aḷavil kuḷattūr Alampaḷam caṭaiyaṉpaṭṭu maṭṭiyakkuṟucci Inta nālu A
karattil māhājanaṅkaḷum kāmanātaṉ caṉṉitiyile Iruntu Iraṇṭu tiṟattar collukiṟa vaḻakkum keṭṭu pūṟuvayiramāka Aṉupavittu ponta nampiyār tiruñāṉacampanta paṇṭitar Irukka puṟattile pacupati paṇṭitar ko
ḷḷa paṇi Alla Eṉṟum tiṟappu Uṇṭu Ānālum pūṟuvam Āṉa tiruñāṉacampanta paṇṭitare koḷḷa prāptam Eṉṟum nālu Akarattil mahājanaṅkaḷum niyamittapaṭiāle nāḷ muppatu vaṭṭamum tiruñāṉacampanta paṇṭitar kāṇi Āka pūṟuvam Aṟṟa mariāti Aṉupavittu
potum paṭi kaṟpittu nammuṭaiya Olaiyum tiruñāṉacampanta paṇṭitaṟku kuṭutta Aḷavukku tāṅkaḷ pacupati paṇṭitaṟku paṇṇak kuṭutta cātaṉamum kaḻittu pokaṭṭu nāḷ muppatu vaṭṭamum tiruñāṉacampanta paṇṭitar pūcikkumpaṭiyum kaṟpittu Immariātikku
koyilile kallum veṭṭuvittu naṭattip potavum raiyi� §
Digital edition of SII 28.259 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
